data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tier-based perk visibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Tier-based perk visibility in storefront and booking flows', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for tier-based visibility, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or reads that confirm this functionality. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of tier-based perk visibility being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add tests for tier-based perk visibility
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that different membership tiers correctly display their respective perks in the storefront and booking flows.
